wordplay_note: His weapons are fake — powder that is dry and cannot fire
card_description: Lars Powderdry (meaning "Powderdry = dry powder (impotent weapon)") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Zap Gun*. Weapons fashion designer in a world where arms races are elaborate shams. Name note: His weapons are fake — powder that is dry and cannot fire. The arms race as fashion show — mutual assured destruction through mutual pretense. First appears in *The Zap Gun*.

reference.brief: Weapons fashion designer in a world where arms races are elaborate shams
reference.significance: The arms race as fashion show — mutual assured destruction through mutual pretense
